scripts.test:core-flows: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:identity && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:checkout
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:identity && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:checkout
scripts.test:all-services: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:identity && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:checkout && npm run test:media && npm run test:notify && npm run test:reporting && npm run test:support && npm run test:assistant
scripts.ci:install:active: npm --prefix apps/web ci && npm --prefix apps/api-gateway ci && npm --prefix services/identity-service ci && npm --prefix services/catalog-service ci && npm --prefix services/checkout-service ci && npm --prefix services/media-service ci && npm --prefix services/notification-service ci && npm --prefix services/reporting-service ci && npm --prefix services/support-service ci && npm --prefix services/assistant-service ci
scripts.ci:validate:active: npm run ci:install:active && npm run ci:test:core && npm run ci:test:all && npm run build:web && npm run ci:compose:check
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:identity && npm run seed:catalog && npm run seed:checkout && npm run seed:support
